## What changed

Describe the user-visible behavior and why it is needed.

## Verification

- [ ] `python browser-takeover/scripts/verify_release.py`
- [ ] Live Chrome or Edge check when browser behavior changed
- [ ] No credentials, private page content, or generated customer files are included
- [ ] Changelog updated for notable changes

## Safety impact

authenticated browser data.
